title: Crispy Pork Shoulder Crumble
description: A flavorful and crispy pork shoulder dish, perfect for a gluten-free meal. The crumble topping adds a delightful texture.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together Saudia, crumble, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the mixture all over the pork shoulder, making sure to coat it evenly.
Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Using two forks, shred the pork into bite-sized pieces.
Return the skillet to the oven and cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the pork is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the crispy pork shoulder crumble hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
